title: Gear Fifth Awakens
description: On pages 12–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Wano Citizens, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Yamato, Kaido as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Go on, reach the souls of the departed...

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: The festival is going to end soon...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ...I manage to survive for next year!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...hahaha, that just means Kaido is at the end of his rope...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Think! Which outcome would you prefer?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Sir Straw Hat defeating Kaido would result...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: in the island falling and all of us plummeting to our deaths....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: On the other hand, Kaido coming out on top...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...would only give us a little longer to cling to our lives!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, when you put it like that... it seems like a no brainer!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I have a kid in Hakumail!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: My wife is down in Ringo!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If Sir Straw hat wins, they can all...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'd never be able to repay him!! Our country would finally be back to normal!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 34 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
